questions.question: What is the primary approach used by Android to play audio files in a background process, allowing for a seamless user experience?
questions.hint: Use the correct Android component to answer this question.

questions.question: A video file is being played on an Android device. Which component is responsible for managing the playback state of the video, such as paused or stopped?
questions.hint: Understand the role of the Android Activity in managing video playback.

questions.question: A Text to Speech (TTS) engine is integrated into an Android app. What is the primary component used to interact with the TTS engine and control its functionality?
questions.hint: Know the TTS API to answer this question.
